title: Translation Service
description: Multi-language i18n for Angular: load JSON translation files by lang and scope, cache them, resolve nested keys and inline references, interpolate params, and react to locale changes via pipe, directive, and service APIs.
imports: import { AXTranslationService, AXTranslationModule, AXTranslatorPipe, AXTranslatorDirective, AXTranslationLoaderService, AX_TRANSLATION_CONFIG, AX_TRANSLATION_LOADER, translationConfig, loadTranslationScope, translateSync, createMultiLanguageString, AXMultiLanguageMap, AXTranslateOptions } from '@acorex/core/translation';

hints.title: Pipe returns Observable
hints.content: The translate pipe returns Observable<string>. Always chain | async in templates: {{ 'common.actions.save' | translate | async }}.

hints.title: Register a custom loader
hints.content: Provide AX_TRANSLATION_LOADER to fetch JSON files. Default loader returns an empty object — translations will not work until you implement it.

hints.title: Locale sync
hints.content: AXTranslationService listens to AXLocaleService.profileChanged$ and calls setActiveLang() automatically. Prefer changing locale via AXLocaleService.setProfile().

hints.title: Preload on startup
hints.content: Import AXTranslationModule in your bootstrap config to run preload() via provideAppInitializer using langs/scopes from AX_TRANSLATION_CONFIG.

hints.title: Inline reference syntax
hints.content: Use @scope:nested.key (e.g. @acorex:common.actions.cancel) or explicit @lang:scope:key. Legacy t('key', { scope: 'common' }) is also supported inside strings.

types.title: AXTranslationService
types.description: Main API for translating keys, multi-language maps, and inline expressions. providedIn: 'root'.

methods.content:
/**
 * Reactive translation. Re-emits when language changes.
 * Accepts plain keys or AXMultiLanguageMap.
 */
translate$(value, options?: AXTranslateOptions): Observable<string>

/**
 * Async translation. Loads scope if missing.
 * Accepts string | AXMultiLanguageMap.
 */
translateAsync(text, options?: AXTranslateOptions): Promise<string>

/**
 * Sync translation from cache. Use waitForLoad for keys not yet loaded.
 */
translateSync(text: string, options?: AXTranslateOptions & { waitForLoad?: boolean; timeoutMs?: number }): string

/** @deprecated Use translateAsync for multi-language resolution. */
resolve(value, locale?): string

types.title: AXTranslationLoaderService
types.description: Caches and loads translation JSON per lang:scope pair.

types.title: AXTranslatorPipe
types.description: Pure pipe named translate. Returns Observable<string>.

types.title: AXTranslatorDirective
types.description: Structural helper: exposes translate function as template context variable t.

types.title: AXTranslationLoader
types.description: Interface for custom translation file loading.

methods.content: load(options: { lang: AXTranslateLang; scope?: AXTranslateScope }): Observable<AXTranslation>

props.name: defaults
props.description: Default language and scope when options are omitted.

props.name: preload?
props.description: Languages and scopes to load on app init.

props.name: fallbacks?
props.description: Fallback chains per lang or scope.

types.title: loadTranslationScope
types.description: Route resolver — preloads scopes from route.data.scope before navigation completes.

types.title: translateSync
types.description: Standalone function delegating to the singleton AXTranslationService instance.

content.data:
The @acorex/core/translation package loads JSON dictionaries organized by language (e.g. en-US, fa-IR) and scope (e.g. acorex, common, document). Each scope maps to one JSON file.

Flow:
1. You provide AX_TRANSLATION_LOADER to fetch JSON
2. AXTranslationLoaderService caches files by lang:scope
3. AXTranslationService resolves keys (including nested dot paths and inline @ references)
4. Templates use the translate pipe; services use translateAsync / translateSync

Nested JSON keys are accessed with dot notation: common.actions.cancel resolves { common: { actions: { cancel: "..." } } }.

Parameter interpolation uses {{name}} placeholders in translation values.

sections.title: Translation File Structure
sections.description: Organize JSON files by lang and scope.

data.content:
{{ 'name' | translate | async }}

{{ 'common.actions.save' | translate:{ scope: 'acorex' } | async }}

{{ 'common.notifications.more' | translate:{ scope: 'acorex', params: { count: 3 } } | async }}

sections.title: Changing Language
sections.description: Switch locale and react to changes.

sections.title: Multi-Language Maps
sections.description: Store per-locale strings in one object.

content.data:
The parser recognizes two inline formats inside any string passed to translateAsync / translateSync / the pipe:

• @scope:nested.key — e.g. @acorex:common.actions.cancel
• @lang:scope:nested.key — explicit language override
• Legacy: t('nested.key', { scope: 'acorex' })

Examples used in ACoreX components:
• @acorex:validation.messages.title — validation summary title
• @acorex:common.general.full-screen — full-screen button aria-label
• @acorex:common.notifications.more — notification counter

When a resolved translation value itself contains @ references, the resolver resolves them recursively.

sections.title: Lazy-Load Scope per Route
sections.description: Preload translations before a route activates.

sections.title: translate Directive
sections.description: Expose t() helper in template context.

data.content:
{{ t('common.actions.save', { scope: 'acorex' }) | async }}

{{ t('@acorex:common.actions.cancel') | async }}

content.data:
Default config (AXTranslationDefaultConfig):
• defaults.lang: en-US
• defaults.scope: acorex
• preload.langs: [en-US]
• preload.scopes: [acorex]
• resolver.scopeKey: scope

Use translationConfig(partial) to merge overrides:

• defaults — fallback lang/scope for every translate call
• preload — langs/scopes loaded on startup (via AXTranslationModule)
• fallbacks.langs — e.g. { 'fa-IR': ['en-US'] } when a key is missing
• fallbacks.scopes — fallback scope chain
• available — document supported langs/scopes (optional metadata)

Events emitted via AXEventService:
• AXSystemEvents.AXLanguageChanged — active lang changed
• AXSystemEvents.AXLanguageLoaded — a scope finished loading

| API | Use when |
|-----|----------|
| translate pipe + async | Template text that updates on lang change |
| translateAsync | Services, await before showing toast/dialog |
| translateSync | Immediate read from cache; set waitForLoad: true if preload may not be done |
| translate$ | Custom RxJS pipelines |
| langChanges$ | Reload data or re-render on language switch |
| loader.preload() | Manual preload before first translate |
| loadTranslationScope | Route-level lazy scope loading |
| createMultiLanguageString | Seed data with en-US + fa-IR entries |

Locale keys in AXMultiLanguageMap must match /^[a-z]{2}-[A-Z]{2}$/ (e.g. en-US, fa-IR).
